Package product

Class Figurine

java.lang.Object
product.Product
product.StoreProduct

public class Figurine extends StoreProduct

Description: It implements the figurines

      public Figurine(double price, String name, String description, String photo, int stock, String dimension, String brand, String material, Category... categories)
      The figurine's constructor
      Parameters:
      price - the figurine's price
      name - the figurine's name
      description - the figurine's description
      photo - the figurine's photo's path
      stock - the figurine's stock
      dimension - the figurine's dimension
      brand - the figurine's brand
      material - the figurine's material
      categories - the figurine's categories
